history.content: Hello! Welcome to Bloom Aesthetics Clinic. 🌸 How can I help you today?
Our Botox treatments start from £200. The results typically last 3-4 months. May I ask what brings you in today — is this your first time considering this treatment?
do you offer laser hair removal?
I want to make sure you get the best support possible. I'm connecting you with a member of our team right now — they'll be in touch shortly. Thank you for your patience. 🌸
